products.name: Rose Dome
products.description: A single preserved rose encased in a crystal-clear resin dome on a walnut base.

children.text: A real rose, carefully preserved at the peak of its bloom and encased forever in crystal-clear epoxy resin atop a hand-turned walnut wood base. This enchanting dome captures the beauty of a moment — perfect for anniversaries, proposals, or as a timeless display piece that never wilts.

products.name: Rose Heart Block
products.description: Preserved roses arranged in a heart-shaped resin block — love made eternal.

children.text: Multiple preserved roses in soft pink hues are delicately arranged inside a heart-shaped resin block. Every petal is frozen in time, creating a breathtaking symbol of love that you can hold in your hands. A stunning anniversary or Valentine's Day gift.

products.name: Bouquet Preservation Block
products.description: Your wedding or special bouquet preserved forever in a stunning resin block.

children.text: Send us your wedding bouquet, anniversary roses, or any meaningful flowers — and we'll preserve them forever in a large rectangular resin block. Every bloom, every petal, every memory crystallized in time. The ultimate keepsake for life's most meaningful moments.
